svg.title: Hochschild-Kostant-Rosenberg Theorem
svg.desc: A schematic placeholder showing the antisymmetrisation map epsilon from Kähler differentials Omega^n_{A/k} to the Hochschild complex C_n(A, A) inducing the HKR isomorphism HH_n(A, A) cong Omega^n_{A/k} for a smooth commutative k-algebra in characteristic zero, with the polynomial-algebra worked example k[x_1, ..., x_d] producing the polyvector field HH^n cong wedge^n Der.

g.text: a₀ da₁ ∧ ... ∧ daₙ ↦ (1/n!) Σ sgn(σ) a₀ ⊗ a_σ(1) ⊗ ... ⊗ a_σ(n)
